flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Germanna Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Germanna Community College rose 37% between 2006 and 2009 (18.4% → 25.3%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Germanna Community College fell 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.9k → $8.4k).
